silent_path.method: Authenticated operator (John Mitchell) navigated directly to /account/impersonate/ec3031ac-6dd9-42e9-b7a7-0c10d9aac07b
silent_path.result: Immediate redirect to / with impersonation active — no intermediate form shown
silent_path.cls_on_redirect: CLS observer installed after redirect; initial load CLS on / measured at Stop 3
silent_path.layout_verdict: N/A — no intermediate layout to audit; silent path produces zero intermediate UI

form_path.reason: Navigating to impersonate URL while authenticated triggers silent path. Form path (ImpersonateForm.vue) is only rendered for unauthenticated access. Re-running a sign-out flow was out of scope for this design audit pass given the operator session was already active.
form_path.recommendation: Form path layout audit should be done with a fresh anonymous session navigating to the impersonate URL. Expected: ImpersonateForm.vue renders with email/password fields. Audit BL-UI-001 CLS on form mount, BL-UI-002 field padding, BL-UI-006 submit button.

BL-UI-001_CLS.note: No intermediate page rendered on silent path

BL-UI-002_spacing.note: No form rendered on silent path
